title: ProDec Contractor 12ft x 9ft Contractor Poly Backed Dust Sheet Drop Cloth For Painting Decorating Covering Stairs, Hallways, Corridors and Floors, Absorbs Spills, No Soak Through, Reusable
features: Dual action cotton twill dust sheet for maximum protection of floors and furniture against dust, paint and paste whilst decorating
Absorbent, hardwearing woven cotton soaks up spills and splashes
Water resistant yet lightweight polythene backing prevents liquid tread-through to the surface below
Tear resistant with anti-fray hem for longer life
description: From the manufacturer ProDec is the UK's biggest and most widely distributed brand of trade decorating accessories, so whether you're a seasoned pro, enthusiastic DIYer or even a beginner, we've got everything you need for a great finish - just add paint Waterproof protection for floors and furniture Cotton dust sheets are a classic decorator's staple, and this dual action poly backed sheet refines the original with the addition of a water resistant polythene layer on the back to not just absorb paint but prevent it from soaking through to the surface below. Made from hardwearing cotton twill, it enables you to protect carpets, hard floors and furniture against spills and splashes when painting, as well as minimising the transfer of dust and debris. The absorbent, lightweight cotton soaks up spills and splashes of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids, whilst the water resistant polythene backing prevents it soaking through to the surface below even when trodden on, which can be difficult or impossible to avoid when you're working. The backing is lightweight so the sheet remains easy to fold to suit the space it's being used in and it doesn't affect how the sheet drapes, enabling you to use it not just on floors but also across furniture. The sheet has a woven, tear resistant construction with hemmed edges to prevent fraying, so it won't let you down even after repeated use, and is easily folded for storage. This sheet is 12' x 9' (3.7m x 2.7m) which is the most popular trade size, ideal for floor areas and furniture such as sofas, chairs, etc. Please note that the plastic backing cannot withstand machine washing so the product should be cleaned/wiped down by hand only. More temporary protection solutions from ProDec ProDec has a range of products for protecting floors and furniture against paint drips, splashes, spills, dust, dirt and more during decorating and general maintenance work. Polythene dust sheets Made from waterproof recyclable LDPE material and available in both sheets and rolls, polythene is lightweight and cost-effective. Super Cling Super Cling is waterproof recyclable LDPE material that has been statically charged to enable it to cling to virtually any surface without the need for taping, including walls, windows, doors, upholstery, bookcases, furniture, cabinets and much more. Self-adhesive films Made from puncture resistant polythene that enables it to withstand heavy traffic, ProDec’s self-adhesive film protects against liquid spills such as paint, varnish, wallpaper paste, oil, grease, mud and more. It applies easily without the need for any special application tools and stays in place once down. Available in Carpet, Hard Floor and Glass grades. Cotton dust sheets Classic cotton twill fabric that soaks up small splashes of paint, wallpaper paste and other liquids, as well as minimising the transfer of dust and debris. Available in a range of sizes in both standard and Protector waterproof plastic backed versions.
